top_signals.title: Singapore inks AI deals with Google, OpenAI as ChatGPT-maker commits $234 million to local ecosystem
top_signals.summary: Singapore has signed new partnerships with Google and OpenAI to strengthen the city-state's position as a global AI hub and accelerating AI deployment.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Experian and Relx fall as City unease over AI impact outweighs buyback billions
top_signals.summary: Shares in Experian hit the bottom of the FTSE 100 in morning trade, with the City underwhelmed by what the credit checking giant called a “record year” and news of a fresh $1bn capital return. It did not look like enough to dispel fears over the potential long-term impact of artificial intelligence on the company, [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
